# this is the build file for project 
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(unit-tests LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID ${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID})

# target
add_executable(example_class "")
set_target_properties(example_class PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "example_class")
set_target_properties(example_class PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(example_class SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/q/quickjs-ng/v0.13.0/b90f1e05389342e283b9224b7684f3ac/include
)
target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE /EHsc)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE -fexceptions)
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE -fexceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(example_class PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(example_class PRIVATE cxx_std_23)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O2>)
else()
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE -O3)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
else()
    target_compile_options(example_class PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET example_class PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreadedDLL")
endif()
target_link_libraries(example_class PRIVATE
    qjs
)
target_link_directories(example_class PRIVATE
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/q/quickjs-ng/v0.13.0/b90f1e05389342e283b9224b7684f3ac/lib
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target example_class
target_sources(example_class PRIVATE 
    examples/example_class.cpp
)

# target
add_executable(unit-tests "")
set_target_properties(unit-tests PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "unit-tests")
set_target_properties(unit-tests PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/windows/x64/release")
target_include_directories(unit-tests PRIVATE
    src
)
target_include_directories(unit-tests SYSTEM PRIVATE
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/c/catch2/v3.14.0/7a04180ac3bd46b7bb4610b8058ff765/include
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/q/quickjs-ng/v0.13.0/b90f1e05389342e283b9224b7684f3ac/include
)
target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE /EHsc)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE -fexceptions)
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE -fexceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(unit-tests PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(unit-tests PRIVATE cxx_std_23)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O2>)
else()
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE -O3)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
else()
    target_compile_options(unit-tests PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET unit-tests PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreadedDLL")
endif()
target_link_libraries(unit-tests PRIVATE
    Catch2Main
    Catch2
    qjs
)
target_link_directories(unit-tests PRIVATE
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/c/catch2/v3.14.0/7a04180ac3bd46b7bb4610b8058ff765/lib
    C:/Users/peter/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/q/quickjs-ng/v0.13.0/b90f1e05389342e283b9224b7684f3ac/lib
)
target_link_options(unit-tests PRIVATE
    -subsystem:console
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target unit-tests
target_sources(unit-tests PRIVATE 
    tests/test_class.cpp
    tests/test_engine.cpp
    tests/test_module.cpp
    tests/test_object.cpp
)
